description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and modern design. It has a long, vented barrel with a prominent front sight and a full-length handguard equipped with accessory rails. The stock is adjustable and features a pistol grip for enhanced control, while the magazine is box-shaped and detachable, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The receiver is solid and streamlined, with visible ejection port and safety selector. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a long vented barrel, adjustable stock, pistol grip, and box magazine, designed for durability and control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile, front sight, and muzzle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the barrel, handguard with rails, box magazine, pistol grip, and adjustable stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine, trigger guard, and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and vented with a prominent front sight
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
